description_long: This is a stylized doll with a large, spherical head and a cylindrical body, featuring a monochrome color scheme. The face is painted with bold, cartoonish features: two large, black, infinity-shaped eyes and a wide, stitched smile reminiscent of a skeleton or Halloween motif. The body is decorated with white skeletal markings on a black background, including ribcage, spine, and arm bone details, giving it a playful yet spooky appearance. The arms and legs are simple, rounded forms, with the left arm raised and the right arm lowered. The back of the doll is plain black, with no additional markings or features. The overall design is minimalist, with smooth surfaces and a matte finish, suitable for urban play environments or as a decorative figure.
description: A black-and-white skeleton-themed doll with a large round head, cartoonish face, and skeletal body markings. The design is minimalist and playful, with smooth, matte surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's expressive face with large infinity-shaped eyes, stitched smile, and detailed skeletal body markings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the roundness of the head, the raised left arm, and partial skeletal markings on the body.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a plain black back with no facial or skeletal details, and both arms visible in their positions.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the lowered right arm and the continuation of the skeletal motif on the body.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is depicted wearing a black bodysuit with white skeletal patterns, mimicking a skeleton costume commonly seen during Halloween or Day of the Dead celebrations. The design is simple, with no additional garments or accessories, and the skeletal motif covers the torso and arms.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with its head facing forward, left arm raised outward, right arm lowered, and both legs straight and close together. The posture is static and balanced.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a fixed, wide stitched smile and large, round, infinity-shaped eyes, giving it a playful and slightly mischievous expression. There are no eyebrows or other facial features.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is completely smooth and bald.
